projectDescription: A collection of leaked and exploited Discord bot source code, documenting extracted bots including multi-feature community bots, vanity URL snipers, mass DM bots, and auto-PFP bots.
keyFeatures: Allstar: full-featured Discord.js community bot with 100+ commands
Anti-nuke system with configurable protections (ban, kick, channel/role create/delete/update)
Vanity URL sniper using Discord WebSocket gateway to steal guild vanity codes
Mass DM bot that sends spam messages to new members across guilds
Auto-PFP bots that post images to channels on a timed loop
cb0/usebot: multi-category Python bot with SQLite, music, voice, and image posting
Prada/Belongs: modular Python bots using cog architecture and discord.py
Various self-bot implementations using discord.py-self for user account automation
publicApiSurface: Allstar prefix commands (default prefix: configurable, 100+ commands)
Allstar slash commands (registered via Discord REST API)
POST /interactions — Express API endpoint for Discord interaction callbacks
Sniper.start() — WebSocket-based vanity URL sniper entry point
Slut() — discord.py-self selfbot entry point with prefix ';'
